understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to reach the goal gem tile marked '+' in each level, avoiding spike tiles that end the run. I needed to complete levels efficiently, managing limited attempts and steps.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement: MOVE_UP, MOVE_DOWN, MOVE_LEFT, MOVE_RIGHT move the player one step in that direction relative to gravity. CLICK [x, y] moves the player to that position if reachable and removes clickable tiles, often creating paths. Gravity is DOWN, meaning moves are relative to the current orientation, affecting how the player traverses the level. Hazards include spike tiles that kill on contact. Undo was not used in this episode. Each level had 2 attempts with 50 turns each.
